title: Delicate French Vegetable Ratatouille
description: A kid-friendly French dish featuring dried fruit and vegetables, cooked in a stone bowl and served in a ratatouille form, this recipe is kosher-friendly and has a unique bitter and glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant and zucchini with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the eggplant and zucchini mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onions and minced garlic until they are softened.
Add the sliced bell peppers to the skillet and continue to cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped dried apricots, tomato paste, and dried thyme, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted eggplant and zucchini to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and bell pepper mixture.
Transfer the ratatouille to a stone bowl and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice.
